name: jvlmotor

metadata.name: JVLMotor
metadata.summary: A library for JVL motors communication with different protocols

documentation: The README.md files will be sent to you if you are a JVL customer

documentation: HELP FUNCTIONS (to be extended according to the needs)

methods.name: JVLMotor.MotorCom.MotorCom.uploadPLC
documentation: ePLC - Only with ModBus so far

methods.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.Communications.Drivers.APSController.APSController.checksum
documentation: Calculate the checksum by summing the first 7 bytes.

methods.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.Communications.Drivers.APSController.APSController.sendCommand
documentation: Send a command following the device's protocol.

methods.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.Communications.Drivers.APSController.APSController.readResponse
documentation: Read the response from the device.

methods.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.Communications.Drivers.APSController.APSController.flushBuffers
documentation: Flush the serial buffers to ensure clean communication.

methods.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.Communications.Drivers.APSController.APSController.close
documentation: Close the serial connection.

methods.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.Communications.SerialCommunication.SerialCommunication.open
documentation: Open the serial port connection.

methods.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.Communications.SerialCommunication.SerialCommunication.close
documentation: Close the serial port connection.

methods.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.Communications.SerialCommunication.SerialCommunication.send
documentation:
Send data through the serial port.

```
param data

Data to be sent (should be bytes or a string)
```

methods.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.Communications.SerialCommunication.SerialCommunication.receive
documentation:
Receive data from the serial port.

```
return

Received data as bytes
```

methods.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.Communications.SerialCommunication.SerialCommunication.flush
documentation: Flush the input and output buffers.

variables.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.EtherCATDSPProtocol.ECM_MODE_PP
documentation: Profile Position mode

variables.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.EtherCATDSPProtocol.ECM_MODE_VELOCITY
documentation: (Not supported)

variables.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.EtherCATDSPProtocol.ECM_MODE_PV
documentation: Profile Velocity mode

variables.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.EtherCATDSPProtocol.ECM_MODE_PT
documentation: (Not supported)

variables.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.EtherCATDSPProtocol.ECM_MODE_HOMING
documentation: Homing mode

variables.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.EtherCATDSPProtocol.ECM_MODE_IP
documentation: Interpolated Position mode (Not supported)

variables.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.EtherCATDSPProtocol.ECM_MODE_CSP
documentation: Cyclic Synchron Position mode

variables.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.EtherCATDSPProtocol.ECM_MODE_CSV
documentation: Cyclic Synchron Velocity mode

variables.name: JVLMotor.Protocols.EtherCATDSPProtocol.ECM_MODE_CST
documentation: Cyclic Synchron Torque mode (Not supported in MIS and miniMAC motors)
